narration: 모기가 당신의 피를 빨려고 주사기를 꽂는 그 순간
visual_prompt: Extreme microscopic macro close-up portrait photography, masterpiece, 8k resolution, cinematic studio lighting, sharp focus: A mosquito with glowing compound eyes and a sharp, menacing needle-like proboscis hovering in the air. Dramatic side lighting, dark atmosphere, highly detailed insect exoskeleton texture. Depth of field with blurred backdrop. Clean neutral white balance, no yellow tint.

narration: 그냥 꽂는 게 아닙니다. 피부 속에서 빨대 끝을 이리저리 휘저으며 혈관을 직접 ‘사냥’하죠.
visual_prompt: Microscopic cellular-level cross-section view, 8k resolution, crisp detail, biological lighting: A mosquito proboscis piercing into layers of translucent human skin cells, penetrating the epidermis and into the dermis searching for a capillary vessel. Cinematic lighting revealing cellular structures, fine hairs, and skin pores. Raw photography look, highly detailed tissue textures. No warm filter, neutral white balance.

narration: 혈관을 뚫으면, 모기의 강력한 펌프가 돌아갑니다. 지금 이 붉은 구슬들이 당신의 피입니다.
visual_prompt: Extreme microscopic view INSIDE a transparent biological tube (mosquito's proboscis), 8k resolution, sharp focus: Crimson red blood cells (erythrocytes) rushing through the tube like a high-speed conveyor belt fluid stream. Backlit transparent cell walls glowing from behind, cinematic microscopy setting, fluid dynamics, liquid rush motion, highly detailed cellular texture.

narration: 모기는 자기 몸무게의 3배가 넘는 피를 배가 터질 때까지 부풀리며 마셔댑니다. 더 기묘한 과학을 보려면 팔로우하세요.
visual_prompt: Extreme macro close-up, masterpiece, 8k resolution: A mosquito's abdomen expanding and pulsating, translucent exoskeleton glowing bright red and translucent with glowing blood volume inside. Highlights glowing from the liquid. Dark dramatic background, ultra-highly detailed insect joint and shell texture, cinematic rim lighting.
